a:r.a:t: Telemarketing | Key roles and incentive drivers
Sell vacation packages to prospective owners via partner call transfers or outbound dialing
Capture qualification info and convert demand into package bookings
Volume focus may hurt downstream tour quality and margin
Early-tenure income volatility can affect workforce stability
Tour allocation variability impacts earning opportunities
Limited tour capacity vs activation velocity pressure
Convert package holders into scheduled travel dates and confirmed reservations
Proactively contact open-dated package holders to lock travel and fill availability
Make confirmation / welcome calls for customers who booked packages
Handle questions, rescheduling, and service recovery to protect attendance
Sell vacation packages to current HGV owners
Drive incremental package volume from the owner base
Contact owners with outstanding packages to get them to use/book them
Convert “open” owner packages into scheduled stays and tour opportunities
Converting demand into booked, high-quality tours
